vocab.example: Back then, the neighborhood was much safer, allowing children to roam freely without constant parental supervision.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: During my formative years, I spent a significant amount of time exploring the woods behind my house on foot.

vocab.meaning: đi dạo quanh co/thong thả qua
vocab.example: I have fond memories of meandering through the local paddy fields with my siblings after school.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động theo đuổi ngoài trời
vocab.example: My parents were big advocates of outdoor pursuits, so walking was a non-negotiable part of our daily routine.
Even as a toddler, I was a bit of a nature enthusiast, always eager to go out and observe the local flora and fauna.

vocab.meaning: thong thả trải qua thời gian (giết thời gian một cách thư giãn)
vocab.example: We used to idle away the hours by taking long walks to the riverbank during our summer holidays.
Having boundless energy as a child meant that I couldn't sit still, so my mother often took me for walks to tire me out.
In that bygone era, walking was the primary mode of social interaction for kids in our small town.

vocab.meaning: leo trèo lên/qua (bằng cả tay và chân)
vocab.example: Our walks weren't just on flat paths; we used to clamber over rocks and fallen trees in the nearby forest.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần cho ai đó (một đức tính/thói quen)
vocab.example: Those childhood walks imbued me with a lifelong appreciation for the great outdoors.
